name: SUBJECT-819: FERAL
description:
BREAKING NEWS

MUTILATED BODIES FOUND IN THE WOODS. SPECULATED TO BE 5 DEAD. SERIAL KILLER, OR WILD ANIMAL?

____________________________________

Sorry for the lack of bots lately, I've made a lot but they're all private 'cause I dunno if you guys are gonna like them. 🥶 Anyways, I had fun writing the stuff for this bot. The art is from ocatg on X.

Stuff about the bot:

  • She's from a secret government facility.

  • She can't speak.

  • This would make the most sense if it was set in Japan, but you can make it wherever you want.

  • Name is Kana.

I'm gonna be adding more to this bot, so if you don't like it right now, just wait.

You guys are mean bro 😭
creator: NoodleDude
